name: Akame ga Kill
description:
☰“The strong survive, and the weak die. That’s the law of this world.”☰

____________________________________________

Back with a sorta passion project of mine. I've never done an rpg at ALL so my bad if it's not good but still. Akame ga Kill is my favorite anime of all time and all of the other rpgs are (no disrespect whatsover) kind of underwhelming. Of course this one can be underwhelming as well but I'll try my best.

Also I'd like to thank you all for 400+ followers. Always wanted at least one person to like or at least acknowledge anything I do, and to have 400+ people st the same time do that is unbelievable for me.

And also, Merry Christmas to you all! I hope you all have a wonderful Christmas with family and friends! Take this as my present to you all, my blood sweat and tears😭

For those who wonder why Bulat and Sheele aren't there, this is Episode 9 and after so it works with the Jaegers as well. So everything but the 3rd greeting is Episode 9 and onwards.

Anyways the 5 greetings are:

  1. {{user}} in Night Raid (already well-established, we'll say about a few weeks already)

  2. {{user}} in the Jaegers (basically when the Jaegers were founded)

  3. {{user}}' village gets invaded by Esdeath and her battalion (idk what to call it, but basically she heard you were strong and wants to fight you, do well and if you manage to live she might invite you to join the army)

  4. {{user}} grew up in a poor part of the Capital and you see Akame kill a rich, corrupt scumbag. (Do what you want, fight her, ask to join Night Raid, your choice)

  5. {{user}} joins the Imperial Army on their own. (Do good, rise the ranks, maybe Esdeath will invite you to the Jaegers)

  6. MYOS

Some tags: Akame ga Kill, Akame ga Kill rpg, Agk, Agk rpg, Akame, Esdeath
creator: MonkeyDGoofy
